drafts.title: Gold-Plated Curb Chain Necklace, 9K Gold, Vintage
drafts.description: Classic gold-plated curb chain necklace in 9K gold, approximately 50cm length. Well-maintained vintage piece with bright lustre and secure spring-ring clasp. Ideal for layering or standalone wear. Minimal wear consistent with age.

drafts.title: Freshwater Pearl Necklace with Gold Spacer Bead Earrings
drafts.description: Elegant freshwater pearl necklace featuring lustrous cream-white pearls strung on beige cord with ornate gold spacer bead centrepiece. Matching single pearl drop earring included. Classic vintage aesthetic, excellent lustre and nacre quality throughout.

drafts.title: Gold Ornate Star Pendant, Floral Relief Design
drafts.description: Decorative gold-tone star pendant with intricate floral relief carving on pentagonal base. Features loop attachment for chain or cord. Vintage jewellery accent piece with detailed craftsmanship. Light patina consistent with age.

drafts.title: Vintage Silver Marcasite Ring, Garnet Stone, Red
drafts.description: Striking vintage silver ring featuring ornate marcasite work flanking a deep red garnet or carnelian stone. Twin decorative head design with intricate faceted metalwork. Hallmarked 9K gold band. Excellent condition with original sparkle.

drafts.title: 9K Gold Hand-Set Garnet Ring, Vintage Estate Jewel
drafts.description: Elegant 9K gold ring featuring deep burgundy garnet cabochon set in ornamental claw mount. Hallmarked 9K inside band. Classic Art Deco/Vintage design with excellent metal patina. Genuine gemstone, collectible estate piece.

drafts.title: 9K Gold Citrine Pendant, Leaf Filigree Mounting
drafts.description: Beautiful 9K gold pendant featuring stunning faceted citrine stone set in elegant leaf-form filigree mounting. Hallmarked 9K. Large oval cut stone with excellent clarity and warm golden hue. Ornate bail for chain attachment.
